Item Name: Amoretti - Mango Lemonade Beverage Infusion Drink Mix & Water Enhancer with Pump for Flavoring Cocktails, Waters, Teas, and other Beverages, 94 Servings Per Bottle (750 ml), Preservative Free Bullet Point 1: VERSATILE FLAVOR: Our beverage infusions are perfect for flavoring waters, hot teas, iced teas, seltzers, cocktails, mocktails, lemonades, sodas, sangrias, champagnes, and more Bullet Point 2: PREMIUM QUALITY: Made with real fruit flavors, no preservatives, non-GMO, vegan, and Kosher Pareve for a clean, natural taste in every pump. Bullet Point 3: BEST VALUE PER SERVING: Highly concentrated with 94 servings per 750ml bottle, delivering more flavor per pump than other brands. Bullet Point 4: SHELF-STABLE & CONVENIENT: Stays fresh even after opening, no refrigeration needed. Includes a free pump for effortless pouring. Bullet Point 5: PROFESSIONALLY CRAFTED: Handcrafted in Southern California and TTB-approved for both home and commercial craft beverage creations. Product Description:

Amoretti Mango Lemonade Beverage Infusion is a delightful pairing of the yummy, juicy deliciousness of mango with the sweetness and tartness of a classic lemonade. Get blown over by the real fruit goodness, tropical feel, and exquisite flavor of this infusion. Experience the Amoretti difference today!

Made with real fruit flavors, our preservative-free, non-GMO, vegan, and Kosher Pareve formula guarantees a premium taste experience in every sip. Whether you're crafting signature cocktails, refreshing spritzers, or bold-flavored mocktails, Amoretti makes it easy to create vibrant, consistent flavors with every pump.

With 94 servings per bottle, Amoretti offers unmatched value and a low-cost-per-serving compared to other brands. Plus, it's shelf-stable, meaning it stays fresh even after opening—no refrigeration required!

Proudly handcrafted in Southern California, Amoretti Beverage Infusions are the ultimate choice for home bartenders, cafés, restaurants, and professional mixologists. Experience the perfect balance of sweet and tart with Amoretti Beverage Infusion—your go-to flavor booster for every drink!

Value: 25.4 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium beverage infusion with real fruit flavors, positioned as a high-quality, versatile flavor enhancer for cocktails, teas, and waters. Glass bottle packaging and handcrafted production suggest a mid-to-high price point, while the high serving count (94 servings per 750ml) offers strong value per use. Non-GMO, vegan, and preservative-free claims further justify premium pricing.

Item Name: Organic Way Dried Hibiscus Flower Cut & Sifted(Hibiscus rosa-sinensis) | Herbal Tea - Organic & Kosher Certified | Raw, Vegan, Non GMO & Gluten Free | USDA Certified | Origin - India (1/2LBS / 8Oz) Bullet Point 1: 100% tested USDA and Kosher certified herbal product Bullet Point 2: Organic products imported from India and packaged in USA Bullet Point 3: Authentic Hibiscus Flower cut & sifted processed in a hygienic environment Bullet Point 4: The packaging is flavor-sealed for freshness Bullet Point 5: 100% Product satisfaction guarantee Product Description:

Hibiscus is a flowering plant native to subtropical and tropical regions throughout the world. The plant is recognized by its large and often colorful five-petal blossoms. In addition to brightening a garden landscape, certain species are used for making food, tea, and folk medicine. You can rely on our products for authenticity and potency. Organic Way imports quality organically grown products from different countries and processes them in the USA for the US market. All our products are USDA and Kosher approved and perfectly safe for use.
